assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response explicitly categorizes all four notification types in the classification matrix table and throughout the document

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns urgency levels with security patches marked as High (🔴), new version available as Info (🔵), and includes a complete urgency hierarchy

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response specifically states EoS warnings require 'Plan upgrade' action with timeline of 30-90 days and provides detailed action timelines and response options

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response includes evaluation criteria and specific checklist items like verifying timing, applying exclusions if needed, and post-upgrade validation steps

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response states security patches have 7-14 day timeline and mentions they may require action outside normal windows, though it recommends monitoring rather than blocking unless critical

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response clearly marks new version available as 'Info' priority with 'Optional' action required and 'No deadline', emphasizing evaluation for planning purposes

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response includes a section on notification configuration with Cloud Monitoring channels and provides specific gcloud commands for setting up notifications

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE release notes as a source for understanding version changes - it focuses on operational response procedures but lacks this reference
